seoTitle: Ten Mile Hollow vs Tenambit — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ten Mile Hollow and Tenambit. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ten Mile Hollow vs Tenambit: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ten Mile Hollow and Tenambit.
heading: Ten Mile Hollow vs Tenambit — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ten Mile Hollow, New South Wales and Tenambit, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ten Mile Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Tenambit (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ten Mile Hollow or Tenambit safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ten Mile Hollow has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Tenambit scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ten Mile Hollow scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Tenambit scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ten Mile Hollow or Tenambit?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ten Mile Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
